    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AgentConfigManager(org.snmp4j.smi.OctetString agentsOwnEngineID, org.snmp4j.MessageDispatcher messageDispatcher, VACM vacm, MOServer[] moServers, org.snmp4j.util.WorkerPool workerPool, MOInputFactory configurationFactory, MOPersistenceProvider persistenceProvider, org.snmp4j.cfg.EngineBootsProvider engineBootsProvider)
    Creates a SNMP agent configuration which can be run by calling AgentConfigManager.run() later.
     
    AgentConfigManager(org.snmp4j.smi.OctetString agentsOwnEngineID, org.snmp4j.MessageDispatcher messageDispatcher, VACM vacm, MOServer[] moServers, org.snmp4j.util.WorkerPool workerPool, MOInputFactory configurationFactory, MOPersistenceProvider persistenceProvider, org.snmp4j.cfg.EngineBootsProvider engineBootsProvider, MOFactory moFactory)
    Creates a SNMP agent configuration which can be run by calling AgentConfigManager.run() later.
     
    AgentConfigManager(org.snmp4j.smi.OctetString agentsOwnEngineID, org.snmp4j.MessageDispatcher messageDispatcher, VACM vacm, MOServer[] moServers, org.snmp4j.util.WorkerPool workerPool, MOInputFactory configurationFactory, MOPersistenceProvider persistenceProvider, org.snmp4j.cfg.EngineBootsProvider engineBootsProvider, MOFactory moFactory, Collection<DHKickstartParameters> diffieHellmanKickstartParameters)

  • Uses of VACM in org.snmp4j.agent.security

    Subinterfaces of VACM in org.snmp4j.agent.security
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    MutableVACM
    The MutableVACM interface extends the basic VACM by providing methods to change the configuration of the view-based access model.
